summary: Good-quality tape featuring a wonderful first set and a mixed second, hailed by some as one of the best ’93 recordings.
review: The recording is generally clear (noted as a PG source with EQ) and captures a strong first set that reviewers describe as "wonderful." The second set is viewed as decent but a bit clunky, though it contains a few standout moments. Opinions diverge, with one fan calling the tape one of the greatest ever heard while another rates it only average for the year.

ai_rating.rationale: Both show and recording are regarded positively overall, but limited (2) and conflicting reviews keep confidence low.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer notes a PG recording with EQ; no major complaints about clarity or mix.

show_quality.setlist_flow: First set praised as wonderful; second set considered decent but somewhat clunky with occasional great moments.
